text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Narita Brian suffers a minor injury during practice.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
choice_data_list: Do you want to continue practice?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
choice_data_list: Do you want to continue practice?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
choice_data_list: Here, let's get you patched up.
Here, let's get you patched up.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With her training cut short, Narita Brian can't hide
her disappointment.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I can start again in just a second.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
All something like this needs to heal is a bit of
spit and—

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Damn. And I'm already short on time.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: This is no time for resting!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian tries to continue despite her injury,
but I gently convince her to pause her training.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Of course. I was never planning on stopping.
choice_data_list: All right, at least let me patch you up.
All right, at least let me patch you up.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
But as soon as you're done wrapping me up, I'm
running. Got it?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems the proper treatment helped. She
continues training after with no issue.
